Title: Verify U-environment initial state
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Check if the U-environment activity is active

Title: Verify registration process
Test Data:
- Valid user data (name, email, password)
- Invalid user data (empty fields, invalid email format)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Navigate to the Register activity
3. Enter valid user data
4. Submit the registration form
5. Check if the registration is successful
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with invalid user data
Expected Result:
- Registration is successful with valid user data
- Registration fails with invalid user data

Title: Verify login process
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is registered
Test Data:
- Valid user credentials (email, password)
- Invalid user credentials (incorrect email or password)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Navigate to the Login activity
3. Enter valid user credentials
4. Submit the login form
5. Check if the user is logged in
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with invalid user credentials
Expected Result:
- User is logged in with valid credentials
- Login fails with invalid credentials

Title: Verify newsletter functionality
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in
Test Data:
- Subscribe to newsletter
- Unsubscribe from newsletter
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user
3. Navigate to the Newsletter activity
4. Subscribe to the newsletter
5. Check if the user is subscribed
6. Navigate to the Newsletter activity again
7. Unsubscribe from the newsletter
8. Check if the user is unsubscribed
Expected Result:
- User is subscribed to the newsletter
- User is unsubscribed from the newsletter

Title: Verify flash activity
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user
3. Navigate to the Flash activity
4. Check if the flash activity is displayed

Title: Verify event creation
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in
Test Data:
- Create an event with valid data (title, description, date, location)
- Create an event with invalid data (empty fields, invalid date format)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user
3. Navigate to the Create event activity
4. Enter valid event data
5. Submit the event creation form
6. Check if the event is created
7. Repeat steps 3-6 with invalid event data
Expected Result:
- Event is created with valid data
- Event creation fails with invalid data

Title: Verify event joining/viewing
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in, event is created
Test Data:
- Join an event
- View an event
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user
3. Navigate to the Join/View event activity
4. Join an event
5. Check if the user is joined to the event
6. View the event details
7. Check if the event details are correct
Expected Result:
- User is joined to the event
- Event details are correct

Title: Verify profile management
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in
Test Data:
- Update user profile with valid data (name, email, password)
- Update user profile with invalid data (empty fields, invalid email format)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user
3. Navigate to the Profile activity
4. Update user profile with valid data
5. Submit the profile update form
6. Check if the user profile is updated
7. Repeat steps 3-6 with invalid user data
Expected Result:
- User profile is updated with valid data
- User profile update fails with invalid data

Title: Verify application exit
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user
3. Navigate to the Exit activity
4. Exit the application

Title: Verify newsletter management
Preconditions: Application is launched, user is logged in, has newsletter management permissions
Test Data:
- Add a new newsletter
- Edit an existing newsletter
- Delete a newsletter
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Log in as a user with newsletter management permissions
3. Navigate to the Newsletter management activity
4. Add a new newsletter
5. Check if the newsletter is added
6. Edit an existing newsletter
7. Check if the newsletter is updated
8. Delete a newsletter
9. Check if the newsletter is deleted
Expected Result:
- Newsletter is added
- Newsletter is updated
- Newsletter is deleted
